name: IRC_AIMATCHING_QUEUE
description: This table is used for processing candidate,requisition and submissions entities to AI.

columns.Name: QUEUE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of this table generated by sequence

columns.Name: AFFECTED_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of entities Submissions,Requisition and Candidates inserted in this table

columns.Name: REFERENCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Value of this column shows that row is already being picked up by a thead for indexing , so that no other threads pick up the row again for indexing.

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: This value shows the type of entity to be indexed - Submission,candidate or Requision

columns.Name: ENT_LAST_MODIFIED_DATE
columns.Comments: Last_modified_date for entity inserted for processing

columns.Name: INDEXING_CODE
columns.Comments: This code tells whether the entity is to be processed in full indexing or incremental indexing

columns.Name: PROCESSOR_ID
columns.Comments: Thread Id of the thread which is going to index this particualr entity row

columns.Name: RETRY_COUNT
columns.Comments: Keeps record of the failed entity in the queue for retrying failed entities.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
